name: read_file
description:
Read a file by path. In restricted mode paths must resolve inside the current registered source scope; allow-all/non-restricted permission modes can use all registered sources, and open mode can also use absolute local paths outside registered sources. Supports plain-text files directly, and also extracts readable text from PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, and image files when possible. Paths may be absolute or relative to a source root. Returns file metadata plus a suggested citation when available.

For large files, the output shows 'showing lines X-Y of Z total'. Use start_line to read subsequent sections (e.g., start_line=101 for the next page). Adjust max_lines for longer or shorter pages.

path.description: Absolute or relative path to the file

start_line.description: 1-based line number to start reading from (default 1)

max_lines.description: Maximum number of lines to return (default 100)
